heroDescription: We do not offer jobs; we offer missions. We are looking for builders, thinkers, and operators who want to define hyper-local commerce.
philosophySubtitle: How we build high-agency, long-term teams.

principles.label: High Agency
principles.title: We value individuals who find a way
principles.description: We want people who get things done despite obstacles, run through walls, and refuse to accept standard constraints.

principles.label: Intellectual Curiosity
principles.title: Deep first-principles understanding
principles.description: You must have a deep desire to understand how things work and build upwards from fundamental truths.

principles.label: Resilience & Grit
principles.title: Building for the long-term
principles.description: Building enduring institutions is hard work. We value persistence and focus over short-term optimization.
